{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201752373DA3B454738D99E5C62E"}"},"total":1671},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7508101172669301566","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的很好，虽然所有副本都不是原创的，都是由现实作品为蓝本，但是作者改编的很有意思，发挥的脑洞创意也很吸引人，最终主角成神有些突然，也许他需要摒弃了所有属于人的喜怒哀乐，才能化身为道，也许成神的那个已经不是他了，他已经选择了殉道"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748131803,"group_id":"7111117440213322763","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我亦飘零久，十年来，恩深负尽，死生师友","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N80Y/OMPGghnDlBRzhIVfGvznxbUUN9tb7cMQ5lu+tH1","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1445222354519070","user_name":"爱吃饺子的蒙哥马利"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1445222354519070","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7111117440213322763","book_info":{"abstract":"【神话+诡异+无限流副本+卡牌+遗物收容物+？】
纪元破灭，文明重启，残存的人类被围困在高墙之内。
旧神不甘远去，选召生灵进入过往的时空中开启游戏。
秦道图穿越而来，觉醒能力：衍化万物。
【职业卡：剑客】衍化→【剑仙】
【技能卡：慧剑】衍化→【剑斩肉身，心斩灵魂】
……
身化道主，执掌星辰，斩灭众神仙佛，化为世末的终焉，成为‘混沌’‘最初’‘终焉’‘轮回’‘阴阳’‘完美’……
曰为：众生之起源，万物之终结。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/2b8510e43ea5b8a4061fd9b70b3a1802~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"火萤","author_id":"","book_id":"7111117440213322763","book_name":"无限流神话：我能衍化万物","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9004人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7111129319099138560","read_count":"9004","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"439516"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"199","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,末世,无限流,架空,东方玄幻,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ec5b042070668f9aae2be8fb16988e0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184357&x-signature=g5%2FBN7DTIdaezXoXELGo4KD70bY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"54157143697","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"42"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201752373DA3B454738D99E5C62E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":832,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19111,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2841},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7172775752365540107","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书很好！就是能不能剧情写的长亿点长亿点！剧情不要跨的太大(ฅ•﹏•ฅ) 埋的坑能不能在章节之中填上一点！
火萤不要再写的书短小了₍₍ (̨̡ ‾᷄ᗣ‾᷅ )̧̢ ₎₎
书的内容很精彩，火萤的文笔还是很彳亍的。还有很多处玩梗。然后主角的形象其实也就是作者的映射嘛（懂的都懂）人物形象刻画很好。（从全面的角度来看的——一点觉得貌似毁形象的其实是自己理解的人物形象不同吧。前几章的认知和别人的评论是不足为据的，要自己看世界。）
最后祝愿火萤能长一些︿(￣︶￣)︿
抱抱(｡･ω･｡)ﾉ♡"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670042110,"group_id":"7111117440213322763","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8obdyikjYIh+RQLFg/6Cl1UxbMCLq6KQP1rvtfgVp6C","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d880506fa8a94748b299ef1f8674af68~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529181&x-signature=cHZGwWMfKtVD8U5YHn%2B6izBfrq4%3D","user_id":"1626874855831507","user_name":"阎格"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1626874855831507","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1770964798,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":33,"name":"巅峰品鉴官","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/66e862e57c3d2bb30fe45e7b14498a89"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7111117440213322763","book_info":{"abstract":"【神话+诡异+无限流副本+卡牌+遗物收容物+？】
